name: terminal-window-manager-electrobun
description: ElectroBun + xterm.js + ConPTY proof of concept for project-based terminal switching.

scripts.start: bun run build:host && vite build && electrobun dev
scripts.dev: bun run build:host && vite build && electrobun dev --watch
scripts.dev:hmr: bun run build:host && concurrently "bun run hmr" "electrobun dev"
scripts.build:desktop: bun run build:host && vite build && electrobun build --env=stable
